questionHtml: With respect to this food chain, outline what is meant by a keystone species.
markschemeHtml:
a. keystone species have a disproportionate effect on the biological community ✔ 

b. removal of the sea bream «due to fishing» ✔

c. results in more sea urchins ✔

d. which significantly reduce the producers/seagrass ✔

Do not accept first trophic level for mpd
